text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to help Taiki Shuttle further hone her skills, we've joined
summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Across the line!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Whew. Was that the last item on the training schedule?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okay! There's actually something I'd like us to do together.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What goes hand in hand with summer camp? That's right—a barbecue!
I've been itchin' to throw one for the longest time!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I was so fired up, I scoured every website and book I could find.
There are lots of delicious foods out there in nature!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So let's gather up some of those super fresh ingredients and have a
barbecue together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She should really be resting after her training session, but those
sparkling eyes make it hard to turn her down.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Woohoo, good! ♪ Thank ya! Then let's get going!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hm-hm-hmm... ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Make sure to look both ways, now. According to one of the books I
read, there should be mushrooms growing around here.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I bet they're even fresher than the ones ya find at the grocery store.
So let's get lookin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Look over there, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Look at those colorful red and white spots! Could that be one of
those legendary mushrooms that turns ya into a giant when ya eat it?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Can't take your eyes off it, huh? Do ya really wanna eat it that badly?
Okay, say no more! I'll go get it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Poisonous?! Oh, that's a real shame. It looked so cool...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Then how 'bout that one? The rainbowy coloring makes it look
really tasty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wondering if she actually just wanted to pick mushrooms, I continue
to follow Taiki as she bounces happily through the trees.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eventually, we emerge to find ourselves on a sandy beach.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! We found the ocean, Trainer! Ya know what that means—shellfish
and sea urchins galore! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before I can stop her, Taiki races out into the water.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whew! I found a whole slew of shellfish! I'm sure there are some you'll
like in here!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Anywhoo, please follow me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may be summer, but she could still catch a cold running around
soaking wet like that.
choice_data_list: Couldn't we just buy the rest?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No! They gotta be fresh! Only the most delicious ingredients will do!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now, let's continue the hunt! Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look, Trainer—a crop field! We've stumbled on a real treasure
trove here! Japanese veggies are downright delicious!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There just happens to be somebody out pluckin' the produce right
now. I'm gonna ask if he'll share his haul if we lend a hand!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Let's go! Go, go, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Up we go... Whew. Okay, mister! I finished pulling all the weeds!

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text:
Hoo boy! Thanks for the help, you two. Go ahead and help yourself
to those vegetables I promised.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yay, thank ya! Hehe. Which veggies would ya like, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Once we've decided, it'll finally be time for the grand finale!
choice_data_list: Isn't it a little late to start setting up?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it'll be no problem—trust me! Come on, Trainer! Hurry up and
make your picks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After selecting my preferred vegetables at Taiki's urging, I follow her
to our next location.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Welcome to our very own happy barbecue party! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There on the beach is a fully equipped barbecue set, seemingly
borrowed from the summer camp facilities.
choice_data_list: W-when did you do all this?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The truth is, I woke up bright and early to get it ready!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So I sure am glad ya didn't say no when I asked ya to help me hunt for
ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: We ended up getting our hands on a bunch of fresh ingredients, so this barbecue's sure to be a special and delicious affair!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Please accept this as a little gift from me to you!
choice_data_list: So this was all for my sake...
So this was all for my sake...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank ya for all your help, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whenever I'm feeling lonely, you're always there for me.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So even though I'm away from my family, my days are full of smiles!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And also, I realized something. You're not just my trainer...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You're my precious Japanese family!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want ya to experience a bona fide barbecue, just like I
used to have with my family back home!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yes! Operation Surprise was a great success!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer! Tell me what ya wanna start with, and leave the rest
to me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I gathered each and every ingredient just for you! They're all here for
ya to enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll pour my heart into grillin' em up real nice, so be sure to eat your
fill!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon, both my stomach and heart are full to bursting from Taiki's
barbecue.
